overall.description: A ship simulator game showing a first-person view from the bridge of a vessel navigating through choppy, overcast waters. The camera looks forward over the bow while navigation monitors display radar, charts, and depth soundings.

scene_state.functional_zone: ship bridge navigating through harbor waters

agents.ego_description: operating the vessel from the bridge, maintaining forward course through moderate seas while monitoring the rotating radar and navigation displays

entered.detail: navigation monitor displaying coastal chart with vessel position and waypoints
circular radar screen with rotating yellow sweep showing surrounding contacts
sonar display showing water depth profile and bottom contour
red-brown metal bow deck with anchor windlass and safety railings
metal safety railings at the forward edge of the bridge deck
choppy dark grey ocean surface with visible wave motion and whitecaps

segments.scene_description: The vessel moves steadily forward through choppy overcast waters, viewed from the ship's bridge. Three navigation monitors display active chart plotting, rotating radar, and depth sounding data while the bow cuts through the grey seas.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a steady forward progression from the ship's bridge through a cold, overcast maritime environment. It begins with the vessel cutting through choppy grey seas, maintaining a constant heading under a heavy sky. As the ship advances, the perspective remains fixed over the bow, where the rhythmic motion of the waves contrasts with the static glow of the bridge equipment. The scene focuses on the integration of the natural elements and technology, as three navigation monitors display active chart plotting, rotating radar, and depth sounding data. The camera continues its forward glide, emphasizing the isolation of the vessel amidst the vast, monochromatic waters.
